file_name: RP_CB Final Analysis - Effect level data dictionary.csv

preview_rows.Description of variable: Abritary number starting at 1 for each original paper and increasing by 1 for each Paper. Same as Paper level and Experiment level.
Abritary number starting at 1 for each unique Study # and increasing by 1 for each Experiment. Same as Experiment level.
Abritary number starting at 1 for each unique Experiment # and increasing by 1 for each Effect.
Abritary number starting at 1 for each unique Effect # and increasing by 1 for each Effect where more than one replication was conducted (e.g., same experiment in more than one cell line).
Description explaining the effect (e.g., which two conditions are being compared).
